title: Proof provider failover fallback after role_orchestrator integration
checks: python3 scripts/provider_failover.py select --role auditor --trace-id e5_001_proof_auditor_primary --task-type proof | tee /tmp/e5_auditor_primary.txt && grep -q 'BEM-PROVIDER-FAILOVER | SELECTED | claude' /tmp/e5_auditor_primary.txt

python3 scripts/provider_failover.py select --role executor --trace-id e5_001_proof_executor_primary --task-type proof | tee /tmp/e5_executor_primary.txt && grep -q 'BEM-PROVIDER-FAILOVER | SELECTED | claude' /tmp/e5_executor_primary.txt
python3 scripts/provider_failover.py mark --provider claude --status limited --reason 'E5-001 fallback proof: simulate Claude limit' --trace-id e5_001_mark_claude_limited

python3 scripts/provider_failover.py select --role auditor --trace-id e5_001_proof_auditor_fallback --task-type proof | tee /tmp/e5_auditor_fallback.txt && grep -q 'BEM-PROVIDER-FAILOVER | SELECTED | gpt' /tmp/e5_auditor_fallback.txt

python3 scripts/provider_failover.py select --role executor --trace-id e5_001_proof_executor_fallback --task-type proof | tee /tmp/e5_executor_fallback.txt && grep -q 'BEM-PROVIDER-FAILOVER | SELECTED | gpt' /tmp/e5_executor_fallback.txt
python3 scripts/provider_failover.py mark --provider claude --status ok --reason 'E5-001 fallback proof complete: restore Claude' --trace-id e5_001_restore_claude_ok

python3 scripts/provider_failover.py select --role auditor --trace-id e5_001_proof_auditor_restored --task-type proof | tee /tmp/e5_auditor_restored.txt && grep -q 'BEM-PROVIDER-FAILOVER | SELECTED | claude' /tmp/e5_auditor_restored.txt
